title: Malik's Rainbow Snacks
synopsis: Little Malik discovers different colored foods and their tasty flavors in this vibrant sensory adventure perfect for toddlers learning about colors.

pages.text: Malik loves to eat! Red strawberries are sweet and juicy. Yum yum!

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes holds a bright red strawberry with red paint splatters and drips dominating the scene in finger paint style
illustration.alt: Malik holding a red strawberry with red paint splashes everywhere

pages.text: Orange carrots are crunchy! Crunch crunch! Malik likes the sound.

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes munches an orange carrot with vibrant orange paint drips and splashes filling the background in joyful finger paint aesthetic
illustration.alt: Malik eating an orange carrot surrounded by orange paint splatters

pages.text: Yellow bananas are soft and smooth. Malik peels the yellow skin.

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes peeling a bright yellow banana with sunny yellow paint splatter drips dominating the sensory visual scene
illustration.alt: Malik peeling a yellow banana with yellow paint splashes all around

pages.text: Green peas are tiny and round. Pop pop! They roll on Malik's plate.

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes looking at green peas on his plate with emerald green paint drips and splatters in splashy painterly style
illustration.alt: Malik looking at green peas with green paint splatters everywhere

pages.text: Blue blueberries burst with flavor! Malik's fingers turn purple-blue from the juicy fruit.

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes with blue-stained fingers holding blueberries with deep blue paint splatter drips in pure color finger paint aesthetic
illustration.alt: Malik with blue-stained fingers holding blueberries surrounded by blue paint

pages.text: Purple grapes are Malik's favorite! So many colors to taste and see. What color will Malik eat next?

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes surrounded by a rainbow of all colors with purple grapes in focus and multicolored paint splatter drips creating joyful color exploration
illustration.alt: Malik surrounded by rainbow colored foods and paint splatters

metadata.illustrationStyle: rainbow colors, splashy painterly, one color dominant per scene, paint splatter drips, sensory visual, joyful pure color, finger paint aesthetic, color exploration

questions.question: What color are strawberries?
questions.explanation: Strawberries are red! Malik loves red strawberries because they are sweet and juicy.

questions.question: What sound do carrots make?
questions.explanation: Carrots go crunch crunch! Malik likes the crunchy sound when he eats orange carrots.

questions.question: What are Malik's favorite purple fruit?
questions.explanation: Purple grapes are Malik's favorite! He loves their sweet taste and pretty purple color.
